race.comment: BLEND OF THREE (2) was keen in the run then met with interference in the straight so his effort to be beaten just 1.5 lengths first-up in a Class 3 Highway over this trip at Randwick had merit. Bullock has won two from two on the five-year-old and is back aboard. Big chance in this open race. VIERVILLE (7) won here at this distance first-up then wasn't far away at the Beaumont last time. Has a perfect third-up record - he will be absolutely cherry ripe for this. FAVOUR THE BOLD (8) resumes. Opened last prep with back-to-back wins at this circuit. Lightly raced and has great scope for improvement this time in work. LIGHTNING SPEED (9) returned in good style at Tamworth last start and will be harder to beat over the extra furlong today. UPWARDLY MOBILE (3) is a good fresh performer back from a short break. Has won two from two here at the trip so it is easy to make a strong case.
